description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated female figure draped in classical robes, exuding a serene and contemplative presence. The figure sits gracefully on a stylized rock or throne, with one arm resting on her lap and the other gently holding a circular object, possibly a shield or a disc, on her left side. The facial features are delicately rendered, with wavy hair styled in an elegant updo. The drapery of her garment cascades naturally over her legs and the base, showcasing fine attention to detail in the folds and texture. The base is rectangular and appears to be part of the same material as the figure, providing stability and a sense of permanence. The overall appearance suggests a neoclassical or allegorical theme, suitable for display in a public or urban setting.
description: A finely detailed seated female figure in classical robes, holding a circular object and resting on a stylized stone base. The sculpture features elegant drapery and a serene expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, both arms, and the circular object held on the left side, with detailed drapery and the base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure, the circular object, and the flowing garment over the legs and base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the draped garment, with the base extending behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile, the arm resting on the lap, and the detailed folds of the robe.
attribute_subject_matter: seated female figure in classical attire
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated on a neutral background.
